svg.text: Ten Class AB No-Overall-Feedback Power Amp Topologies
Rails are +/-15 V and total voltage gain is constrained to Av = 10.
01. Single-ended cascoded VAS, double EF AB
Local only: emitter/source resistors, current sources, output emitter resistors
No global feedback from OUT to input. Complexity 5/10.
02. JFET input, single-ended cascode, double EF AB
Local only: emitter/source resistors, current sources, output emitter resistors
No global feedback from OUT to input. Complexity 6/10.
03. BJT differential input, cascoded VAS, double EF AB
Local only: emitter/source resistors, current sources, output emitter resistors
No global feedback from OUT to input. Complexity 7/10.
04. Folded cascode VAS, double EF AB
Local only: emitter/source resistors, current sources, output emitter resistors
No global feedback from OUT to input. Complexity 8/10.
05. Complementary cascoded VAS, double EF AB
Local only: emitter/source resistors, current sources, output emitter resistors
No global feedback from OUT to input. Complexity 8/10.
06. Complementary cascoded VAS, triple EF AB
Local only: emitter/source resistors, current sources, output emitter resistors
No global feedback from OUT to input. Complexity 9/10.
07. Complementary folded cascode, CFP AB output
Local only: emitter/source resistors, current sources, output emitter resistors
No global feedback from OUT to input. Complexity 9/10.
Local only: emitter/source resistors, current sources, output emitter resistors
No global feedback from OUT to input. Complexity 9/10.
09. Diamond input, symmetric cascode, double EF AB
Local only: emitter/source resistors, current sources, output emitter resistors
No global feedback from OUT to input. Complexity 9/10.
Local only: emitter/source resistors, current sources, output emitter resistors
No global feedback from OUT to input. Complexity 6/10.
